case_title: FRANK-LIN DISTILLERS PRODUCTS LTD. vs. THE WINE SHOP et al

docket_entries.description: STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF AUG-15-1995, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON AUG-15-1995, AND WHY COURT SHOULD NOT DISMISS CASE OR TAKE OTHER APPROPRIATE ACTION. HEARING SET FOR SEP-14-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF SEP-14-1995, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $50.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON SEP-14-1995, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), AND WHY COURT SHOULD NOT DISMISS CASE OR TAKE OTHER ACTION., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE OCT-10-1995 CONTINUED FROM SEP-14-1995 TO OCT-16-1995 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF OCT-16-1995, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $100.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON OCT-16-1995, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), 3RD OSC FOR PLAINTIFF: $150.00 SANTIONS NOW DUE., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE NOV-10-1995 CONTINUED FROM OCT-16-1995 TO NOV-15-1995 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FRANK-LIN DISTILLERS PRODUCTS LTD. AS TO DEFENDANT THE WINE SHOP DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          AUG-15-1995 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-16-1995 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JUL-26-1995
OSC CALENDAR OF NOV-15-1995, DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO SECTIONS 581(D) & 581(M) OF THE CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE AND CALIFORNIA CASUALTY INDEMNITY CO. -VS- SUPERIOR COURT, (1995) 36 CAL.APP.4TH 678.
